name: example-prompt-hooks
description: Example plugin demonstrating prompt-type hooks. Disable before use — these hooks inject text into every model turn.

PreToolUse.body: You are about to run {tool_name} with input: {tool_input}. Before proceeding, confirm this aligns with the user's current goal.

PostToolUse.body: You just ran {tool_name}. If the result involves a code change, verify it still compiles and that any related tests pass before continuing.
